title: Marketing Executive
description:
About Cognitus Academy

Cognitus Academy is committed to delivering high-quality English education for both Primary and Secondary School students, specialising in student-centric learning experiences. We are looking for a creative and driven Marketing Executive to support our marketing initiatives, content creation, and lead generation efforts.

About the Role

The Marketing Executive will play a key role in executing marketing activities across content, campaigns, and events. This is a hands-on role suited for someone who enjoys creating content, supporting on-ground initiatives, and contributing directly to business growth by funneling leads to the sales team.

Key Responsibilities

Content Creation & Production

  • Film and edit marketing content for social media, website, and campaigns

  • Assist with basic video editing, post-production, and content optimisation

  • Ensure content aligns with Cognitus Academy’s brand and messaging

Content Strategy, Graphic Design and Marketing Support

  • Support content planning and execution across digital platforms

  • Assist in developing marketing ideas and campaigns to increase brand awareness and engagement

  • Monitor basic content and campaign performance and suggest improvements

Paid Advertising & Performance Analytics (Meta Ads)

  • Plan, set up, and manage paid advertising campaigns across Meta platforms (Facebook & Instagram) to support enrolment, events, and brand awareness

  • Create and A/B test ad creatives, copy, audiences, and formats to optimise campaign performance based on performance insights 

  • Monitor ad performance metrics including reach, engagement, CAC, CPL and conversions

  • Prepare simple performance reports and provide data-driven recommendations for improvement

Events & On-Ground Marketing

  • Assist with setup and execution of marketing events, workshops, and open houses

  • Support logistics, materials preparation, and on-site coordination

  • Capture photo and video content during events for post-event marketing us

Lead Generation & Sales Funnel Support

  • Support marketing initiatives aimed at generating leads

  • Help qualify and funnel marketing leads to the sales team

  • Assist with basic tracking and reporting of leads and campaign outcomes

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Marketing, Communications, Media, or a related field (or relevant experience/portfolio)

  • Comfortable with filming and editing content using mobile or camera equipment

  • Understanding of digital marketing, campaign creation and content strategy

  • Willingness to support weekend events and on-site activities when required

  • Organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple tasks in a fast moving environment

  • Strong communication, teamwork skills and an interest in education

  • Experience with video editing tools (CapCut)

  • Familiarity with social media platforms and analytics

Working Hours (Probation period will be 1-3 months)

  • First 6 months: Tuesday to Saturday (to acclimatise to the team and Saturday operations)

  • After 6 months: Monday to Friday

  • Weekdays: 10.30am – 7.30pm

  • Saturdays: 8.30am – 5.30pm

Leave & Benefits

  • Annual Leave: 14 days per year + 1 birthday leave

  • Sick Leave: 14 days paid sick leave, in accordance with MOM guidelines

Why Join Cognitus Academy

  • Hands-on exposure across multiple areas of marketing

  • Opportunity to build a strong marketing portfolio

  • Supportive team environment with room for growth
